faqs.question: Why are stink bugs so common in Morningside Heights apartments?
faqs.answer: Morningside Heights' combination of older pre-war buildings with gaps around windows, proximity to Morningside and Riverside Parks, and abundance of vegetation creates ideal conditions for stink bugs. They enter through small cracks and crevices seeking warmth, particularly in fall, and are attracted to the south-facing exposures common in the area's apartments and brownstones.

faqs.answer: Most stink bug treatments in Morningside Heights show immediate results, with significant reduction within 24-48 hours. Our $350 - $550 service includes follow-up monitoring to ensure all stink bugs are eliminated and entry points are properly sealed to prevent re-infestation.

faqs.question: Will stink bug treatment cause odor in my apartment?
